clusters.name: New Game Reveals & Major Announcements
clusters.logic: Focuses on the unveiling of brand new Pokémon video games or significant main series entries, including initial trailers and release information.

clusters.name: Existing Game Updates & Mobile Content
clusters.logic: Concentrates on updates, expansions, and new content for currently available Pokémon games, with a particular emphasis on mobile titles.

clusters.name: Merchandise, Anime & Franchise Expansions
clusters.logic: Covers announcements related to the broader Pokémon multimedia franchise, such as new merchandise, anime series, movies, or Trading Card Game news.

validationHistory.q: Pokémon Presents new game reveal trailer release date
validationHistory.theme: Focus on the most anticipated announcements of entirely new Pokémon video games and their initial details.

validationHistory.q: Pokémon Presents update mobile game Pokémon GO DLC
validationHistory.theme: Focus on ongoing content, updates, and expansions for existing Pokémon games, especially popular mobile titles.

validationHistory.q: Pokémon Presents merchandise anime TCG collectibles
validationHistory.theme: Focus on non-game related announcements, including new products, media, and other brand extensions within the Pokémon franchise.
